meaning: adj.相似的,类推的,有相似之处的
examples: Structure similarity is the basis of analogical reasoning.
This analogical learning process can be interactive when the user suggests useful domains and correspondences.
The Possibility of Knowing God: The Image of God Analogical Thinking, and Clear, Real, Authoritative Knowledge.
It is the abode of the Archetypal Images of all existence and the realm of all mythology, which provides for us analogical knowledge by which we can peer into multiple levels of being.
